hypothesis: Adding concrete DROP criteria to PHILOSOPHY.md will reduce falsification-resistance from 62.5% to <40%
expect: PHILOSOPHY.md gains falsifiability column with DROP criteria for all 24 active beliefs. 13 PARTIALLY beliefs get measurable thresholds.
actual: Section added with 24 DROP criteria. 9 F, 13 P (now with thresholds), 2 U. 5 escape mechanisms mapped to 12 beliefs. Session-number deadlines (S600/S700/S800) for persistent gaps.
diff: Expected column; actual was separate section (better readability). 22/24 have concrete DROP thresholds vs 0 before.
result: CONFIRMED — structural enforcement of falsifiability per L-601.
